origin.capability_match: cast their votes during the voting period

security_gap.gap_description: An attacker could potentially spoof votes by impersonating legitimate voters.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Spoofed votes could change the outcome of governance decisions.

assumptions: There is no strong authentication mechanism in place to verify the identity of voters.
An attacker can compromise or control user accounts.

mitigation.strategy: Implement strong authentication using cryptographic signatures to verify voter identity.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

trace_source.matched_capability: cast their votes during the voting period
